Title: Get Single Product by ID
Description: Validate the retrieval of a single product by ID
Expected Response: Should return a single product object by ID
Validations:
Successful response.
JSON schema validation.
Response is a non-empty object.
Verify the returned product matches the provided product ID.

Title: Get All Products
Description: Validate the retrieval of all products
Expected Response: Should return an array of products
Validations:
Successful response.
JSON schema validation.
Response is a non-empty array.
Validate the length of the array is as expected.

Title: Get Single Product by Slug
Description: Validate the retrieval of a single product by slug
Expected Response: Should return a single product object by slug
Validations:
Successful response.
JSON schema validation.
Response is a non-empty object.
Verify the returned product matches the provided product slug.

Successful response.

Successful response.

Title: Delete a Product
Description: Validate deleting an existing product by ID
Expected Response: Should confirm deletion (true or empty response)
Validations:
Successful response.
JSON schema validation.
